value:
Subject: Application for Software Engineer Generative AI ML Role at Apple IN

Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to submit my application for the Software Engineer Generative AI ML position at Apple India. With a B.Tech in Computer Science from GLA University and hands-on experience developing production-grade AI systems, I am eager to contribute to Apple's innovative team.

My expertise includes fine-tuning Large Language Models, building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and deploying AI-powered solutions. I have also developed full-stack web applications, integrating backend APIs, authentication, and payment systems—skills that align well with the requirements of this role. I am passionate about leveraging generative AI and machine learning to create impactful, user-centric products.

Apple’s commitment to diversity and inclusion resonates deeply with me. I am excited about the opportunity to collaborate with a team that values different perspectives and experiences, driving innovation that serves everyone.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of contributing to Apple’s groundbreaking work in AI.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Contact Information]  
[LinkedIn Profile or Portfolio Link, if applicable]
